generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor current sensor (I_M) measuring motor electrical current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder positioned on the motor shaft providing motor position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox providing gearbox position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataStream
]

// Data Transmitted (MQTT Topics)
instance CurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxPositionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

// Data (Sensor traces and derived signals)
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace from I_M sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position trace from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox position trace from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance CalculatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque trace calculated from current sensor readings via motor electrical model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance CalculatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity trace derived from motor position increments"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance CalculatedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration trace derived from successive velocity increments"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance SimulatedMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current trace generated by Simulink motor model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace generated by Simulink friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity trace generated by Simulink gear models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance SimulatedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular acceleration trace generated by Simulink gear models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

// Models
instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor used for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel stage in the first axis drivetrain"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox stage in the first axis drivetrain"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Coulomb‑Viscous friction model parameterized for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Stribeck friction model parameterized for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Dahl friction model parameterized for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box LuGre friction model parameterized for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulator
]

// Enablers (Tools & Infrastructure)
instance SysMLModelTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool providing structural and behavioral models of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink engine executing the robot axis simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationDataGenerationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell linking models and live data for semantic integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASLinkService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker streaming live sensor data from the PLC/CNC to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTDataService, RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard platform visualizing measured, reference and simulated data traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardDataService
]

// Services
instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service exposing SysML models for design review and model‑based engineering"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCompletenessInsight
]

instance SimulationDataGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating simulated data from Simulink models of the axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationStatusInsight
]

instance AASLinkService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking models and live data via the Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLinkInsight
]

instance MQTTDataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring reliable MQTT transmission of sensor data to the twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance DashboardDataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing user interaction and visualization of data traces on the dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardAvailabilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard aggregating measured, reference and simulated data traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight, UserInteractionInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous friction identification using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight
]

// Insights and Actions
instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and quantification of friction loss in the gearbox based on data traces"
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time update of friction model parameters to improve control accuracy"
]

instance ModelCompletenessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of completeness of SysML models for the axis"
]

instance SimulationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring status and performance of the simulation models"
]

instance DataLinkInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of semantic linkage between models and live data via AAS"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring reliability and latency of MQTT data transmission"
]

instance DashboardAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensuring availability and responsiveness of the web dashboard"
]

instance UserInteractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring user interactions with the visualization dashboard"
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically updates friction model parameters in the simulation based on online identification"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment and Component
instance MABI_MAX_100_1stAxisTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxisOfMABI_MAX_100
]

instance FirstAxisOfMABI_MAX_100 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor and two gearboxes"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data ingestion and processing synchronized with the robot’s sampling rate (typical motor encoder rate, e.g., 1 kHz); continuous identification and analysis during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML asset model, AAS integration component, Simulink simulation engine, MQTT data ingestion, processing component that consumes input traces and generates derived traces, and a web‑based dashboard presenting all data."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase – the digital shadow monitors and identifies friction losses during the robot’s operational life, using models derived from the as‑manufactured asset description."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data points from source to processing component; validation by comparing simulated outputs (with friction models) to measured data; continuous parameter identification for white‑box and black‑box models; uncertainty handled via comparison of multiple frictionalisms (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data transmitted via MQTT protocol; asset and data linking through Asset Administration Shells (AAS) following IEC 6285; integration with robot PLC/CNC to obtain sensor streams."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shells conforming to IEC 6285, and adherence to the Digital Shadow Reference Model concept defined in the literature."
]
